name: One Skillet: Italian Sausage and Harvest Vegetable Stew
recipeInstructions:
Preparation time: 0 minutes (plus 45 minutes simmering)
Ripe tomatoes may be replaced with 3 14-ounce cans of tomatoes - drained and chopped.
1. Use a knife tip to slit the sausage skins lengthwise. Remove the sausage meat and pinch it into small meatballs.
2. Heat olive oil over medium heat in a large skillet or heavy-bottomed saucepan. Add sausage and onions; cook for 10 minutes or until nicely browned, stirring frequently as you prepare carrots and potatoes.
3. Stir in garlic, rosemary, and thyme. Add carrots, potatoes, and tomatoes. Bring the mixture to a slow boil. Adjust heat to simmer, cover, and cook for 45 minutes or until vegetables are very tender, stirring occasionally. If necessary, add up to 1/4 cup boiling water.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Sprinkle each portion with chopped parsley if desired.
